prompt_text: Compare Teamtailor and Lever for build a beautiful careers site and track all applicants in one place
response:
# Teamtailor vs Lever: Careers Site & Applicant Tracking

## **Careers Site Quality**

| Feature | Teamtailor | Lever |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| **Design** | Modern, template-based | Professional, highly customizable |
| **Setup Time** | 2-3 days | 3-5 days |
| **Mobile Experience** | Excellent | Excellent |
| **Branding Control** | Good (limited custom code) | Excellent (full custom code access) |
| **Pre-built Templates** | 15-20+ templates | 10+ templates |

**Winner: Lever** if you need heavy customization; **Teamtailor** if you want speed

---

## **Applicant Tracking**

| Feature | Teamtailor | Lever |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| **Pipeline Management** | Intuitive, visual | Robust, flexible |
| **Customization** | Limited | Extensive |
| **Automation** | Basic | Advanced |
| **AI Features** | Resume screening | Resume screening + more |
| **Integrations** | 50+ | 80+ |
| **Learning Curve** | Easier | Steeper |

**Winner: Lever** for complex hiring; **Teamtailor** for simplicity

---

## **Pricing**

- **Teamtailor**: $99-599/month (more affordable)
- **Lever**: $299-799+/month (enterprise pricing available)

---

## **Best For**

| Choose Teamtailor | Choose Lever |
|------------------|-------------|
| Growing startups (< 50 employees) | Mid-market & enterprises |
| Budget-conscious | Full customization needed |
| Simple workflows | Complex multi-team hiring |
| Fast implementation | Long-term scalability |

---

## **Quick Verdict**

- **Teamtailor**: Better for beautiful sites quickly + lighter tracking needs
- **Lever**: Better for sophisticated tracking + extensive site control

**Recommendation**: Start with **Teamtailor** if budget/speed matters; choose **Lever** if you have complex hiring workflows or need enterprise features.
